title: Korean-Style Chestnut and Mushroom Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and savory stir fry made with chestnuts, mushrooms, and a hint of Korean spices.
instructions: 1. Heat the sesame oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
2. Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
3. Add the sliced chestnuts and cook for 3-4 minutes, until they start to brown.
4. Add the sliced mushrooms and cook for an additional 4-5 minutes, until they are tender.
5. In a small bowl, whisk together the tang, soy sauce, and brown sugar.
6. Pour the tang mixture over the chestnuts and mushrooms, and stir to combine.
7. Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
8. Stir in the chopped green onions and toasted sesame seeds.
9. Serve the stir fry hot, garnished with additional green onions and sesame seeds if desired.
